name: Teradyne, Inc.
description: Teradyne, Inc. is a leading global supplier of automation equipment for test and industrial applications. The company designs, develops, manufactures, and sells automatic test systems used to test semiconductors, wireless products, data storage, and complex electronic systems in the consumer, communications, industrial, and government markets. Additionally, Teradyne's Industrial Automation segment includes collaborative robotic arms, autonomous mobile robots, and advanced robotic control software, helping manufacturers of all sizes improve productivity and lower costs. Headquartered in North Reading, Massachusetts, Teradyne is a key enabler of the global electronics and manufacturing ecosystems.
